text: Mom took me to the vet because I was still sneezing and they told her I have a collapsed trachea. Mom got me a new harness and has been giving me pills inside of yummy chicken. Not sure what it means but now I have all of the attention. Guess who gets spoiled now? Me!!! #chasesays #shihtzuofinstagram #chicagoshihtxu #collapsedtrachea
